title: The Masquerade Bandit
writer: Ethel Hill (story), Enid Hibbard (story), William E. Wing (scenario)
actors: Tom Tyler, Dorothy Dunbar, Ethan Laidlaw, Alfred Hewston
plot: A young girl, Molly Marble, is enmeshed in a train robbery by her crooked step-father. She meets a stranger, Jeff Morton, and suspects he knows where the loot is hidden. For the sake of her...
